src: A small plant with slender, elongated dark green leaves tinged with pink, growing vertically in a geometric black pot containing pebbles. Each leaf has a smooth surface and a narrow shape.
edit: A vibrant, large flower with multiple full, rounded petals in vivid colors. The petals display shades of purple and yellow. It is placed in a geometric black pot with small decorative stones.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object stands centered in a black pot on a gray concrete surface, surrounded by scattered pine needles, creating a rustic outdoor feel.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is centrally placed in a black pot, resting on a decorative green metallic surface with artistic leaf patterns.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is positioned slightly to the left on a black pot, set on a blue-gray balcony railing, with a blurred outdoor landscape in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is placed to the front of a black pot on a blue balcony surface, showing a parking lot and trees in the blurred backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object stands in the center of a black pot on a white windowsill, with an outdoor scene visible through the window behind it.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object stands vertically in a black pot on a darkened windowsill, with vertical railings and trees visible through the window screen.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is centrally placed in a black pot on a textured marble surface with varied shades of gray and brown.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object is placed upright in a black pot on a smooth black tabletop, with furniture and household items faintly visible in the soft focus.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The large flower blooms in the pot on a spring-themed concrete surface, surrounded by delicate spring flowers and fresh green shoots.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The large flower fills the pot, resting on a spring-themed green metallic surface adorned with sculptural flower patterns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The large flower sits in the pot on a spring-inspired blue-gray railing, with verdant, blooming landscapes in the blurred background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The large flower sways slightly in the pot on a spring-blue surface, against a backdrop of blossoming trees and a lively atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The large flower blooms fully in the pot on a windowsill, with vibrant spring scenes and blossoming flowers visible outside the window.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The large flower stands tall in the pot on a spring-themed windowsill, against a background of fresh green foliage and pastel blossoms.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The large flower reduces the pot space, on a spring-themed marble surface, surrounded by images of blooming flowers and fresh colors.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The large flower fills the pot, set on a spring-inspired tabletop, with hints of sunlight and nearby spring flora in the soft background.

prompt_shared: a big blooming flower in a pot
